modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding or deleting shared calendar in Outlook

full_description_text:  
I was trying to add a shared calendar in Outlook, but it’s not working. Also, I want to delete a shared calendar, but I don’t know how. Can you help me with this? I just need to fix the calendar stuff.
short_description: Trouble adding or deleting shared calendar in Outlook
description: I was trying to add a shared calendar in Outlook, but it’s not working. Also, I want to delete a shared calendar, but I don’t know how. Can you help me with this? I just need to fix the calendar stuff.
